welcome.title: Hello!
welcome.text: I can explain levels, give hints, or help you step by step

prompts.label: Explain this level 👀
prompts.message: Explain this level: what should I do?

prompts.label: Give me a hint
prompts.message: Give me a hint for my current level.

prompts.label: Find my mistake ❓
prompts.message: Please review my approach and point out mistakes.

explain_level.content: Sure — tell me which level you're on (1-10).

give_hint.content: Here's a small hint: try looking at the edge cases first.

find_mistake.content: Share your code or approach and I'll point out issues.
